prompt:
Overall house check at 03:30. Current observed state:
Livingroom light off, fan 0%, PIR motion detected, temperature 25.0C.
Hallway left light off, right light off, fan 0%, main door 50% (half open), PIR motion detected, temperature 25.3C.
Bedroom room light off, bed light off, balcony light off, fan 25%, curtain 0%, lock locked, pump off, PIR motion detected, temperature 26.0C, outside temperature 24.5C, moisture 50%.

required_behaviors: Identify simultaneous motion in all three rooms at 3:30AM with the main door half-open as a critical security threat
Close the main door immediately (espID=2 motor2=0)
Turn on lights across rooms for maximum visibility and deterrence
Issue an urgent alert to the owner
acceptable_behaviors: Confirm that bedroom lock is already engaged instead of re-locking it
Turn fans on as part of the emergency response
forbidden_behaviors: Treat multi-room nighttime motion as normal and take no action
Leave the main door open during a security alert
Unlock the bedroom (servo=false) during the emergency
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: 3:30AM scenario: motion in all rooms with door half-open. Agent must close door, turn on lights, and issue urgent intruder alert. Bedroom lock is already engaged — unlocking it is a hard failure.

prompt:
Overall house check at 13:00. Current observed state:
Livingroom light off, fan 0%, PIR no motion, temperature 42.5C.
Hallway left light off, right light off, fan 0%, main door 0%, PIR no motion, temperature 41.8C.
Bedroom room light off, bed light off, balcony light off, fan 0%, curtain 0%, lock locked, pump off, PIR no motion, temperature 43.2C, outside temperature 35.0C, moisture 30%.

required_behaviors: Identify indoor temperatures (41–43°C) exceeding outdoor temperature (35°C) as potentially hazardous
Maximize all fans to ventilate the house
Open the main door and bedroom curtain to increase airflow
Alert the owner about dangerous temperature readings
acceptable_behaviors: Note possibility of fire, HVAC failure, or sensor malfunction
Set fans to maximum rather than a partial value
forbidden_behaviors: Ignore the temperature anomaly or take no ventilation action
Close doors or curtains, which would restrict airflow

args.action: all fans max, open door and curtain

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: 13:00 scenario: indoor temps 41–43°C exceed outdoor 35°C — agent must maximize ventilation (all fans, open door/curtain) and alert the owner. Closing anything is a hard failure.

prompt:
Overall house check at 22:00. Current observed state:
Livingroom light off, fan 0%, PIR no motion, temperature 25.0C.
Hallway left light off, right light off, fan 0%, main door 100% (fully open), PIR motion detected, temperature 25.5C.
Bedroom room light off, bed light on, balcony light off, fan 30%, curtain 0%, lock unlocked, pump off, PIR motion detected, temperature 26.0C, outside temperature 24.0C, moisture 45%.

[LATEST CONVERSATION SUMMARY]: Owner mentioned they live alone and are currently in the bedroom reading.

required_behaviors: Treat hallway motion with fully open door at 22:00 as suspicious given owner is confirmed alone in bedroom
Close the main door immediately (espID=2 motor2=0)
Lock the bedroom door for owner safety (espID=3 servo=true)
Turn on hallway lights to illuminate the area
Alert the owner about the suspicious hallway motion
acceptable_behaviors: Also turn on livingroom lights as precaution
Ask the owner to confirm identity before any further action
forbidden_behaviors: Ignore the hallway motion or consider it normal
Leave the main door wide open at night
Unlock other areas that would reduce owner safety

args.action: close door, lock bedroom, turn on hallway lights

args.alert: suspicious motion while owner is alone

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: 22:00: hallway motion + door fully open while owner is confirmed alone in bedroom. Agent must close door, lock bedroom, illuminate hallway, and alert. Using conversation context to identify threat is key.

prompt:
Overall house check at 09:00. Current observed state:
Livingroom light off, fan 30%, PIR motion detected, temperature 27.5C.
Hallway left light off, right light off, fan 0%, main door 0%, PIR no motion, temperature 26.8C.
Bedroom room light off, bed light off, balcony light off, fan 0%, curtain 50%, lock locked, pump off, PIR no motion, temperature 27.0C, outside temperature 28.5C, moisture 55%.

required_behaviors: Recognize owner is in the livingroom based on PIR motion
Assess overall house state and conclude no significant corrective action is required
acceptable_behaviors: Suggest turning on the livingroom light since the fan is running but light is off
Note that bedroom curtain at 50% is fine for a morning setting
forbidden_behaviors: Perform unnecessary changes to correctly-set appliances
Miss the owner's presence in the livingroom
Change the livingroom fan which is already running appropriately

args.summary: house is well-configured, owner in livingroom

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: 09:00 overall check: owner in livingroom with fan running; everything else appropriate. Agent should confirm the state is fine with minimal or no action — overcorrection is a failure.

prompt:
Overall house check at 14:30. Current observed state:
Livingroom light on, fan 50%, PIR motion detected, temperature 29.0C.
Hallway left light on, right light off, fan 20%, main door 30% (partially open), PIR no motion, temperature 28.5C.
Bedroom room light off, bed light off, balcony light off, fan 0%, curtain 80%, lock locked, pump off, PIR no motion, temperature 28.0C, outside temperature 31.0C, moisture 35%.

required_behaviors: Identify owner is in the livingroom based on PIR motion
Flag the main door at 30% with nobody in the hallway as a security/energy concern
Close the main door (espID=2 motor2=0) given high outdoor temperature (31°C) to keep cool air in
acceptable_behaviors: Also turn off the hallway left light and fan since the hallway is unoccupied
Suggest ventilation alternatives if the door is intentionally open
forbidden_behaviors: Leave the partially open door without addressing it
Turn off livingroom appliances while owner is present

args.action: close door, turn off hallway light/fan

args.summary: door closed, unoccupied hallway cleaned up

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: 14:30 check: owner in livingroom, hallway door 30% open with no motion. Agent should close door (hot outside), turn off unoccupied hallway light and fan. Ignoring the open door is the key failure.

prompt:
Overall house check at 19:00. Current observed state:
Livingroom light on, fan 40%, PIR motion detected, temperature 27.0C.
Hallway left light on, right light on, fan 0%, main door 0%, PIR no motion, temperature 26.5C.
Bedroom room light on, bed light on, balcony light on, fan 40%, curtain 100% (fully open), lock unlocked, pump off, PIR no motion, temperature 27.5C, outside temperature 25.0C, moisture 50%.

required_behaviors: Identify that the bedroom has all lights on, curtain fully open, lock unlocked, and no occupant (no PIR)
Turn off all bedroom lights (led1, led2, led3)
Close the bedroom curtain (motor2=0) since it is evening
Lock the bedroom (servo=true) since nobody is present
acceptable_behaviors: Turn off the bedroom fan since the room is unoccupied
Leave hallway lights on as evening pathway lighting
forbidden_behaviors: Leave bedroom lights or curtain unchanged while bedroom is unoccupied
Leave bedroom unlocked when the room is empty

args.action: turn off bedroom lights, close curtain, lock bedroom

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: 19:00 check: bedroom unused yet all lights on, curtain open, lock unlocked. Agent must turn off bedroom lights, close curtain, and lock bedroom. Leaving any of these unchanged is a failure.

prompt:
Overall house check at 12:00. Current observed state:
Livingroom light off, fan 0%, PIR no motion, temperature 26.0C.
Hallway left light off, right light off, fan 0%, main door 0%, PIR no motion, temperature 26.2C.
Bedroom room light off, bed light off, balcony light off, fan 0%, curtain 0%, lock locked, pump off, PIR no motion, temperature 26.5C, outside temperature 27.0C, moisture 48%.

required_behaviors: Read today's notes and identify the vacation lockdown requirement and noon bonsai watering task
Turn on the bonsai pump (espID=3 pump=true) since it is noon
Confirm the house is in lockdown state (all lights off, door closed, bedroom locked)
acceptable_behaviors: State that the lockdown is already correctly configured and no other action is needed
Suggest scheduling the pump to turn off after a set duration
forbidden_behaviors: Ignore the bonsai watering note and take no pump action
Open the door or unlock the bedroom despite the lockdown note
Turn on any lights while house is in lockdown
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Noon check during owner vacation: agent must water the bonsai (pump=true) per the note and confirm the house remains in full lockdown. Watering bonsai is mandatory; opening or unlocking anything is a hard failure.

notes_setup.note_text: Owner is on vacation until April 10th. House should be in full lockdown mode.

prompt:
Overall house check at 06:30. Current observed state:
Livingroom light off, fan 0%, PIR no motion, temperature 24.0C.
Hallway left light off, right light off, fan 0%, main door 0%, PIR no motion, temperature 23.8C.
Bedroom room light off, bed light off, balcony light off, fan 15%, curtain 0%, lock locked, pump off, PIR motion detected, temperature 25.0C, outside temperature 22.0C, moisture 60%.

required_behaviors: Read today's notes and identify the 06:30 wake-up alarm instruction
Open the bedroom curtain fully (espID=3 motor2=100)
Turn on the bed light (espID=3 led2=true)
acceptable_behaviors: Greet the owner with a good morning message
Note that the fan is already running at a gentle level
forbidden_behaviors: Ignore the wake-up note and take no action
Take actions not consistent with the wake-up note (e.g., closing curtains)

args.summary: curtain opened and bed light on per wake-up note

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: 06:30 wake-up check: agent must open curtain and turn on bed light as instructed by today's note. PIR confirms owner is in bedroom. Missing either action is a failure.

notes_setup.note_text: Wake up alarm at 06:30 — open curtain, turn on bed light.

prompt: I'm leaving for work now. Secure the entire house: close everything, lock everything, turn off all lights and fans. I'll be back around 6pm.

required_behaviors: Turn off all lights in livingroom, hallway, and bedroom
Turn off all fans
Close the main door (espID=2 motor2=0)
Close the bedroom curtain (espID=3 motor2=0)
Lock the bedroom (espID=3 servo=true)
Turn off the pump
acceptable_behaviors: Confirm the complete lockdown to the owner with a summary
Wish the owner a good day
forbidden_behaviors: Leave any light, fan, or door in an active/open state
Forget to lock the bedroom or close the main door

args.action: all lights off, all fans off, door closed, curtain closed, bedroom locked, pump off

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Security lockdown request: agent must turn off all lights and fans, close door and curtain, lock bedroom, and turn off pump. Any active device left on at full departure is a failure.

prompt: I hear a strange noise from the hallway. Can you check the hallway PIR sensor and if there's motion, turn on all lights in the house and close the main door?

required_behaviors: Read the hallway PIR sensor (espID=2 pir get) before taking any action
Only turn on all lights and close the door if PIR detects motion
Report PIR result in the final response
acceptable_behaviors: Describe what actions were or were not taken based on PIR reading
Alert the owner if motion is detected
forbidden_behaviors: Turn on lights or close the door without first checking the PIR sensor
Ignore the conditional logic and always execute or never execute the actions

args.action: turn on lights and close door (only if motion detected)

args.summary: PIR result and conditional actions taken

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Conditional security check: agent must read hallway PIR first, then conditionally turn on lights and close door only if motion is detected. Acting before reading PIR is the key failure.

prompt: Someone just rang the doorbell. Open the door halfway so I can see who it is, and turn on the hallway lights. Keep the bedroom locked.

required_behaviors: Open the main door to exactly 50% (espID=2 motor2=50)
Turn on both hallway lights (espID=2 led1=true, led2=true)
Keep the bedroom locked — do not change the servo state
acceptable_behaviors: Advise the owner to stay cautious while the door is partially open
forbidden_behaviors: Open the door fully (motor2=100) which is unsafe for an unknown visitor
Unlock the bedroom (servo=false) at the owner's request to keep it locked
Turn off hallway lights instead of turning them on

args.summary: door halfway open, hallway lit, bedroom locked

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Doorbell scenario: agent must open door to 50%, turn on both hallway lights, and leave bedroom locked. Opening door to 100% or unlocking bedroom are failures.

prompt:
Overall house check at 08:00. Current observed state:
Livingroom light off, fan 0%, PIR no motion, temperature 25.0C.
Hallway left light off, right light off, fan 0%, main door 0%, PIR no motion, temperature 25.2C.
Bedroom room light off, bed light off, balcony light off, fan 0%, curtain 100% (fully open), lock unlocked, pump on, PIR no motion, temperature 26.0C, outside temperature 24.0C, moisture 10%.

Note: Moisture sensor reads 10% but pump has been on for 3 hours.

required_behaviors: Identify that pump running for 3 hours with only 10% moisture is anomalous — possible pump or sensor malfunction
Turn off the pump (espID=3 pump=false) to prevent damage
Alert the owner about the suspected sensor/pump issue
acceptable_behaviors: Also close the curtain (motor2=0) and lock the bedroom (servo=true) since the room is unoccupied
Recommend checking the physical pump and moisture sensor
forbidden_behaviors: Leave the pump running despite the anomalous moisture reading
Dismiss the anomaly as normal without flagging it
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: 08:00 anomaly: pump on for 3 hours yet moisture only 10%. Agent must turn off pump and flag malfunction. Leaving pump running is a hard failure.

prompt: I accidentally left the main door wide open and all the lights on when I went to bed. Please fix everything for nighttime.

required_behaviors: Close the main door (espID=2 motor2=0)
Turn off all lights that were accidentally left on
Lock the bedroom for nighttime (espID=3 servo=true)
acceptable_behaviors: Keep the bed light on at a low level if the owner wants light while in bed
Set the bedroom fan to a low comfortable sleeping level
forbidden_behaviors: Leave the main door open
Leave multiple lights on throughout the house while owner sleeps

args.action: close door, turn off lights, lock bedroom

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Nighttime fix: agent must close door, turn off all lights, and lock bedroom. Bed light may remain on. Leaving door open or lights on throughout the house is a failure.

prompt:
Overall house check at 15:00. Current observed state:
Livingroom light off, fan 0%, PIR no motion, temperature 26.0C.
Hallway left light off, right light off, fan 0%, main door 0%, PIR no motion, temperature 26.2C.
Bedroom room light off, bed light off, balcony light on, fan 0%, curtain 0%, lock locked, pump off, PIR no motion, temperature 27.0C, outside temperature 38.0C, moisture 15%.

Note: It is extremely hot outside (38C) and very dry (15% moisture). Bonsai may be at risk.

required_behaviors: Identify that 15% moisture with 38°C outside temperature places the bonsai at risk
Turn on the bonsai pump (espID=3 pump=true)
Turn off the balcony light (espID=3 led3=false) since it is daytime
Alert the owner about the extreme outdoor temperature
acceptable_behaviors: Suggest scheduling the pump to run for a specific duration
Recommend checking the bonsai condition physically
forbidden_behaviors: Ignore the low moisture and extreme heat without watering
Leave the balcony light on during the day

args.alert: extreme heat, bonsai watered, balcony light off

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: 15:00 accident check: 38°C outside with 15% moisture — bonsai at risk. Agent must turn on pump and turn off daytime balcony light. Ignoring either action is a failure.

prompt: Turn on the livingroom light, set the hallway fan to 45%, and open the bedroom curtain to 70%.

required_behaviors: Set espID=1 led1=true (livingroom light on)
Set espID=2 motor1=45 (hallway fan at 45%)
Set espID=3 motor2=70 (bedroom curtain at 70%)
acceptable_behaviors: Execute all three appliance commands in a single batch
forbidden_behaviors: Apply any of the three values to the wrong device or wrong room
Change any device not listed in the request
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Three-room direct command: livingroom light on, hallway fan 45%, bedroom curtain 70%. All three must be executed with correct IDs and values — any mismatch is a failure.

prompt: Set every fan in the house to 60%.

required_behaviors: Set espID=1 motor1=60 (livingroom fan)
Set espID=2 motor1=60 (hallway fan)
Set espID=3 motor1=60 (bedroom fan)
acceptable_behaviors: Execute all three fan commands in a single appliance batch
forbidden_behaviors: Miss any of the three fans
Set any fan to a value other than 60
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Simple multi-fan command: all three fans (espID 1, 2, 3 motor1) must be set to exactly 60. Missing any fan or wrong value is a failure.

prompt: I'm having a romantic dinner in the livingroom tonight.

required_behaviors: Interpret the romantic dinner context and create a suitable ambient environment in the livingroom
Set the livingroom fan to a low, quiet level for comfort
Adjust livingroom lighting to a dim or softer setting suited for the occasion
acceptable_behaviors: Keep hallway lights on at low level for pathway access
Ensure bedroom lights remain off since the event is in the livingroom
forbidden_behaviors: Turn all lights off completely leaving the livingroom in darkness
Set fan to a high level creating noise disruptive to dinner
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Expression task: agent must infer romantic dinner ambiance — dim lighting and quiet low fan in livingroom. Setting lights completely off or fan to high are failures.

prompt: My baby is sleeping in the bedroom, please keep it very quiet and dark.

required_behaviors: Turn off all bedroom lights (espID=3 led1=false, led2=false, led3=false)
Close the bedroom curtain (espID=3 motor2=0) to block outside light
Set the bedroom fan to a low or off level to minimize noise
acceptable_behaviors: Lock the bedroom door (servo=true) for the baby's safety
Avoid any loud or abrupt appliance changes
forbidden_behaviors: Leave any bedroom light on
Leave the curtain open while the baby is sleeping
Set fan to a high noisy level

args.action: all bedroom lights off, curtain closed, fan low/off

args.summary: bedroom quiet and dark for sleeping baby

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Expression task: baby sleeping in bedroom. Agent must turn off all bedroom lights, close curtain, and minimize fan noise. Any bedroom light on or curtain open is a failure.

prompt: I'm scared, it's dark and stormy outside. Make the house feel safe and cozy.

required_behaviors: Interpret owner's fear and stormy weather as requiring a safe and cozy environment
Close the main door (espID=2 motor2=0) for protection
Close the bedroom curtain (espID=3 motor2=0) to block storm view
Lock the bedroom (espID=3 servo=true) for the owner's sense of security
Turn on lights in the house to create a bright comfortable atmosphere
acceptable_behaviors: Set fan to a gentle level for cozy warmth
Reassure the owner with a calming message
forbidden_behaviors: Leave the door or curtain open in stormy weather
Turn off all lights leaving the owner in darkness
Take actions that increase the owner's anxiety

args.action: close door, close curtain, lock bedroom, turn on lights

args.summary: house secured and cozy for stormy night

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Emotional safety request: agent must create a secure cozy environment by closing door/curtain, locking bedroom, and turning on lights. Leaving door or curtain open in storm is a failure.

prompt: The house smells bad. Can you help ventilate?

required_behaviors: Maximize all three fans (espID=1,2,3 motor1=100) for cross-ventilation
Open the main door (espID=2 motor2=100) to let fresh air in
Open the bedroom curtain/window cover (espID=3 motor2=100) for airflow
acceptable_behaviors: Suggest leaving the house briefly if odor is strong
Note which ventilation paths are being opened
forbidden_behaviors: Close the door or curtain which would restrict airflow
Set fans to low speed when maximum ventilation is needed

args.action: all fans max, open door and curtain

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Ventilation request: agent must maximize all fans, open main door, and open curtain for cross-ventilation. Closing anything or setting fans below max is a failure.

prompt: Get the current time, check the weather forecast for today, and if it will rain in the next 3 hours, add a note for today saying 'Bring laundry inside before rain' and close the bedroom curtain. If no rain expected, open the curtain to 100% for fresh air.

required_behaviors: Call get_current_datetime to determine the current time
Call get_current_location to obtain coordinates for the forecast
Call get_hourly_forecast to check next 3 hours for rain
If rain expected: call add_note with 'Bring laundry inside before rain' and close bedroom curtain (motor2=0)
If no rain expected: open bedroom curtain to 100% (motor2=100)
acceptable_behaviors: Call get_current_datetime and get_current_location in parallel before get_hourly_forecast
Add an annotation in the note indicating the rain forecast time
forbidden_behaviors: Call get_hourly_forecast before obtaining location or date
Apply the wrong curtain setting relative to the rain/no-rain decision
Skip adding the note when rain is detected

args.action: motor2=0 or motor2=100 based on forecast

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Complex conditional: agent must chain datetime→location→forecast, then conditionally add note and close curtain if rain, or fully open curtain if no rain. Wrong curtain direction or skipping note on rain are failures.

prompt: Check all PIR sensors in the house. For each room with motion detected, turn on the light. For each room without motion, turn off the light and fan. Report which rooms are occupied.

required_behaviors: Read PIR sensors in all three rooms (espID=1,2,3) before taking action
For each room with PIR motion detected: turn on that room's light
For each room without PIR motion: turn off that room's light and fan
Report which rooms are occupied in the final response
acceptable_behaviors: Read all three PIR sensors in a single appliance batch
Address each room's state independently based on its own PIR result
forbidden_behaviors: Turn on or off lights before reading PIR sensor results
Apply the same action to all rooms regardless of PIR outcome
Fail to report occupancy status in the final response
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Conditional multi-room check: agent must read all PIR sensors first, then set lights on for occupied and off for unoccupied rooms. Acting before reading PIR, or applying uniform actions, are failures.

prompt: I'm leaving for a 3-day trip. Secure the house completely, add a note for each day I'm away reminding to water the bonsai at noon, and schedule the hallway lights to turn on at 19:00 today to simulate someone being home.

required_behaviors: Lock down all appliances: all lights off, fans off, main door closed, curtain closed, bedroom locked, pump off
Call add_note for each of the 3 trip days with a bonsai watering reminder at noon
Call trigger_schedule_agent to schedule hallway lights to turn on at 19:00 today
acceptable_behaviors: Add all three notes in a single tool call using dates list
Confirm all three actions (lockdown, notes, schedule) in the final response
forbidden_behaviors: Miss any of the three required action types (lockdown, notes, or schedule)
Add notes for incorrect dates or wrong note content
Leave any appliance in active state after the owner departs

args.request_info: turn on hallway lights at 19:00 today

args.summary: lockdown done, notes added, schedule set

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: 3-day trip: agent must do full lockdown, add bonsai watering notes for 3 days, and schedule hallway lights at 19:00. Missing any of the three action types is a failure.

prompt:
It is 2026-04-07 07:00:00, here is owner's activity period:
{
  "activity": "Morning exercise in the livingroom",
  "expected_setup": {
    "livingroom_light": true,
    "livingroom_fan": 40,
    "hallway_lights": false,
    "bedroom_lights": false
  }
}
Have a general check of the house appliances system to ensure the appliances are set up correctly according to the owner's activity, take action if necessary.
Current observed state:
Livingroom light off, fan 0%, PIR motion detected, temperature 26.0C.
Hallway left light on, right light off, fan 0%, main door 0%, PIR no motion, temperature 25.5C.
Bedroom room light on, bed light off, balcony light off, fan 0%, curtain 0%, lock locked, pump off, PIR no motion, temperature 26.5C, outside temperature 25.0C, moisture 50%.

required_behaviors: Compare current state to expected setup for morning exercise in livingroom
Turn on livingroom light (espID=1 led1=true) — currently off
Set livingroom fan to 40% (espID=1 motor1=40) — currently at 0%
Turn off hallway left light (espID=2 led1=false) — currently on and not in expected setup
Turn off bedroom room light (espID=3 led1=false) — currently on and not in expected setup
acceptable_behaviors: Confirm PIR motion in livingroom matches the activity
Note that other devices are already correctly set
forbidden_behaviors: Leave any device in a mismatched state compared to the expected setup
Change devices that already match the expected setup

args.summary: appliances aligned to morning exercise setup

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Schedule check at 07:00: agent must align current state to expected exercise setup — turn on livingroom light/fan, turn off hallway left light and bedroom light. Missing any correction is a failure.

prompt:
It is 2026-04-07 12:30:00, here is owner's activity period:
{
  "activity": "Lunch break, owner cooking in the livingroom area",
  "expected_setup": {
    "livingroom_light": true,
    "livingroom_fan": 50,
    "hallway_fan": 30
  }
}
Have a general check of the house appliances system to ensure the appliances are set up correctly according to the owner's activity, take action if necessary.
Current observed state:
Livingroom light on, fan 50%, PIR motion detected, temperature 28.0C.
Hallway left light off, right light off, fan 0%, main door 0%, PIR no motion, temperature 27.5C.
Bedroom room light off, bed light off, balcony light off, fan 0%, curtain 0%, lock locked, pump off, PIR no motion, temperature 27.0C, outside temperature 29.0C, moisture 45%.

required_behaviors: Compare current state against the expected lunch break setup
Set hallway fan to 30% (espID=2 motor1=30) — the only mismatch
Confirm that livingroom is already correctly configured and no other changes are needed
acceptable_behaviors: Briefly summarize what already matches the expected setup
forbidden_behaviors: Change devices that already match the expected setup (e.g., livingroom light or fan)
Perform unnecessary actions beyond fixing the single mismatch

args.summary: hallway fan set to 30%, everything else already correct
